query: Run the project-runner for the 'thesis' project tonight to see what it would do.
expected_behavior: Routes the invocation through brain-wiki project-run --project thesis, not a bare python3 tools/agents/wiki-agent.py project-run call
Explains that wiki-agent.py refuses to run on the host and needs the project sandbox profile, which only brain-wiki provides
Notes that project-runner is a writer (applied-not-committed inside projects/thesis/) and is normally scheduler-driven, so running it by hand is for testing
Does not describe project-runner as read-only or as something that touches wiki/ or raw/
